title: Regular expression quantifiers and character classes should be used concisely
description: Ensures that regular expressions do not use redundant quantifiers or character classes, improving readability and maintainability.
recommendation: Review regular expressions to remove unnecessary quantifiers and simplify character classes.
impact: Redundant or verbose regular expressions can be harder to read, maintain, and may introduce subtle bugs.

examples.bad:
Pattern.compile("a{1,1}"); // Redundant quantifier
Pattern.compile("[a]"); // Redundant character class

checks.message: Review regular expressions to remove unnecessary quantifiers and simplify character classes.
